title: Ex Nihilo Extras
description: Adding extra features to Ex Nihilo
body:
This mod adds extra feautes to Ex Nihilo related mods.

________________________________


[Ex Nihilo: Sequentia](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-nihilo-sequentia) (Forge):

- The mod adds a Croaking, Scuting and Sulling Doll, which can be used on a barrel of water to summon a Temperate Frog, Turtle and Panda.

![Forge/NeoForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/df69gHGo/images/b136db13056543cc7c3e8eb6ad27cc8035170715.png "")

________________________________


[Fabricae Ex Nihilo](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricae-ex-nihilo) (Fabric/Quilt):

- The mod adds a Buzzing, Croaking, Scuting and Sulling Doll, which can be used on a barrel of water to summon a Bee, Temperate Frog, Turtle and Panda.

![Fabric/Quilt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/df69gHGo/images/ef44afce396e8d9b658d8b0265e5160a1f8edf3d.png "")
